description:
A screenshot of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) data catalogue interface, detailing the ingestion status and metadata for a 'CLC+Backbone (2018)' dataset. The interface is divided into a left sidebar with general information and a main right panel displaying a geographic map of Europe and a table of input classes.

The left sidebar, titled "General Information", provides the following details:
- Name: CLC+Backbone (2018)
- Country: European Environment Agency (38+UK)
- Region: -
- Reference Year: 2018
- Time Range of Ingested Data: 01.07.2017 - 30.06.2019
- INSPIRE Themes: LC Land cover (referencing Directive 2007/2/EC, Infrastructure for Spatial Information in the European Community)
- Created By: CLC+ Core User Admin/Support
- Organisation/s: CLC (CORINE Land Cover), European Environment Agency (EEA)
- Visibility: Public - All Organisations
- Contact Person: copernicus@eea.europa.eu

At the top of the main panel, actions like "REPUBLISH ON GEOSERVER" and "ARCHIVE" are available. Below the "Ingestion 'CLC+Backbone (2018)' USED" title, an "APPROVE EAGLE COMPLIANCE" button is displayed next to the "EIONET Action Group EAGLE Land Monitoring in Europe" logo.

The main right panel features a map of Europe with country borders and major city labels (e.g., London, Paris, Berlin, Rome, Warsaw, Kyiv, Moscow, Oslo). The map background is a natural-colour satellite mosaic. A scale bar indicates 300 km and 300 mi. Attribution is "Leaflet | © Core003 Mosaic, © OpenStreetMap contributors". Search fields for "Country" and "Region" are positioned above the map.

Below the map, an "Input Classes" section lists dataset categories. A "DOWNLOAD EAGLE BARCODING" button is present. The table displays "Class Code", "Name", "EAGLE Elements", "100% EAGLE compliant", "Colour", and "Show in Map" columns. Two visible rows are:
- Class Code 1: Name "Sealed (buildings and flat sealed ...", EAGLE Elements "Sealed Artificial Surfaces and Con... +4". It is 100% EAGLE compliant (checked), assigned a red colour, and not shown in the map (toggle off).
- Class Code 2: Name "Woody - needle leaved trees", EAGLE Elements "Trees +1". It is 100% EAGLE compliant (checked), assigned a green colour, and not shown in the map (toggle off).
